# [Jupiter] Unlock credit limit page changes

# **What problem are we solving?**

Change copies on the verify interest and charges page for partners with MFC fetch.

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

1. This page should be behind a partner flag. Currently should be live only for Jupiter.
2. I should be able to make it live for other partners by adding partner to the config value.
